title: Hut 8 GPU-as-a-Service Vertical Goes Live with Inaugural Deployment
text: Hut 8's GPU-as-a-service vertical began generating revenue as its inaugural GPU cluster for an AI cloud developer came fully online in September 2024. Technical Specifications: The cluster, hosted at a tier-three data center in Chicago, comprises multiple Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Cray supercomputers powered by 1,000 NVIDIA H100 GPUs. Partnership and Structure: Hut 8 partnered with HPE and AdvizeX to design, configure, and commission the cluster, which is being launched under Hut 8's subsidiary, Highrise AI, Inc. The five-year agreement with the AI cloud developer provides for fixed infrastructure payments plus revenue-sharing. Strategic Importance: The launch of the GPU-as-a-service vertical further diversifies Hut 8's compute layer, which now spans AI compute, Bitcoin mining, and traditional cloud services. This marks a significant milestone in Hut 8's transition from pure Bitcoin mining to multi-platform infrastructure services.
